content:
—————————

Week 2-4 Retention Tracking

Hello x, I'm reaching out because you are currently failing the class. Let’s set up a time to chat so we can ensure you are able to succeed in the class! Please let me know what days and times you are available for a phone call!

Student is failing the course with the current GPA of xx%. I reached out to the student's appropriate campus liaison and dean. I also contacted them via their campus email and their alternate email to set up a meeting to discuss their grade.

Student is failing the course with the current GPA of xx%. I contacted them via their campus email and their alternate email to set up a meeting to discuss their grade.

—————————

Week 2 Discussion Forum

Thank you for posting, x!

You must incorporate quotes from the text with which you are engaging, not to support your points merely but as a way to investigate the subject matter even further.

The discussion posts require you respond to at least two peer's posts in a substantial and meaningful manner (~150 words). The goal here is to further along the conversation and achieve higher learning. Challenge each other's thoughts, ask questions, or perhaps agree but with a difference.
context: From document: Week 1 Retention Tracking — chunk 4 (chunk 4/133)
